pages.text: Drinks-and-food secondary. Crafts the full Brewin' and Chewin' catalogue — fermenting infrastructure (Keg, Fermentation Controller, Tankard, Item Coaster), beers and ales, spirits, cocktails, cheeses, hot dishes (pizza, quiche, lasagna, fondue, soup, omelet, sandwich), and cured foods (jerky, kimchi, pickles, fudge).$(br2)Drinks grant the mod's own buff effects; no vanilla potions are gated through Brewer.
